subject: [PATCH v4 14/21] mm: swap: decouple virtual swap slot from backing store

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch decouples virtual swap slots from their backing storage, allowing them to be backed by physical swap slots, zero swap pages, compressed objects in the zswap pool, or in-memory pages. This change enables the use of zswap and zero swap page optimization without reserving a slot on a swapfile or a swapfile at all, resulting in significant disk space savings for hosts with high memory usage. The patch also introduces new requirements for batched swap operations to ensure that entries have consistent backing states.
